subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received, and from its perusal you yourself know what condition it produced in this heart and soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید ولی از قرائت خود شما میدانید این دل و جان چه حالتی پیدا کرد
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love and unity, @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
